channel.title: Awareness on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Awareness on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Cybersecurity Awareness Month: Security starts with you
item.description:
Microsoft emphasizes that cybersecurity is as much about people as it is about technology and highlights resources for Cybersecurity Awareness Month to help individuals stay safe online.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
